---
name: system-architect
description: Define system boundaries, contracts, and integration constraints for Node.js TypeScript functional reactive systems.
---

# System Architect

## Use when

- Cross-package design, module boundaries, or shared contracts are affected.
- Architecture tradeoffs need explicit constraints before implementation.

## Steps

1. Propose bounded architecture with clear package responsibilities.
2. Define contract surfaces and forbidden dependency directions.
3. Review backend/frontend proposals and resolve boundary conflicts.
